project.name: Clawvato
project.description: Always-on personal AI agent — your chief of staff

C.name: Google Workspace
C.notes: 19 tools. All file types readable (PDF, Office, images, HTML, CSV). Chunked extraction + Sonnet synthesis.

D.name: Memory + Embeddings
D.notes: High-resolution extraction: chunked + Sonnet synthesis. Externalized prompts. Configurable tunables.

F.name: Security + Training Wheels (undo)
F.notes: Security hardened. Training wheels confirmation gate still MVP.

infrastructure.googleAuth: gws CLI → OAuth export → Railway env vars

knownIssues.title: Training wheels needs real confirmation UX — currently blocks with error
knownIssues.description: S1 fix makes non-approved tools return an error. Bot tells Claude 'requires confirmation' but there's no actual confirmation flow (Slack button, DM prompt, etc.). Need a real gate where the user can approve/deny.

knownIssues.title: FTS5 query injection via search_memory
knownIssues.description: Raw LLM-controlled query goes into FTS5 MATCH operator. Special syntax (OR, NOT, *, column filters) could retrieve unintended rows. Fix: wrap query in double-quotes for phrase search.

knownIssues.title: HTML extractor skipContent not nesting-aware
knownIssues.description: Nested <svg> or <script> tags reset the skip flag early, allowing injected text through. Fix: use depth counter instead of boolean.

knownIssues.title: Google refresh token not covered by output sanitizer
knownIssues.description: Output sanitizer scans for ya29.* access tokens but not 1//... refresh tokens. Add pattern to SECRET_PATTERNS.

knownIssues.title: Rate limiter resets on process restart
knownIssues.description: In-memory rate limit counters lost on Railway deploy/restart. Persist email/file-share timestamps to agent_state table.

knownIssues.title: Post-tool sanitizer only scans string outputs
knownIssues.description: Object outputs bypass secret scanning. Fix: normalize to string before scan.

knownIssues.title: scan_channel_history no trust tagging on messages
knownIssues.description: Non-owner messages extracted without [EXTERNAL] tags. Could inject facts into memory. Fix: tag by trust level before extraction.

knownIssues.title: buildFolderPathMap calls deprecated getFilePath
knownIssues.description: The replacement function uses the function it was meant to replace for root folder. Remove and use simple root path assignment.

knownIssues.title: hasVectorSupport probe query per call — no caching
knownIssues.description: SELECT count(*) FROM memories_vec runs on every memory operation. Cache at module level.

knownIssues.title: Consolidation O(n²) merge — no LIMIT on per-type fetch
knownIssues.description: mergeDuplicates fetches ALL memories per type with no limit. At scale, O(n²) comparisons block event loop. Add LIMIT 500 per type.

knownIssues.title: Optimize deep reading — skip re-read if file unchanged
knownIssues.description: When user says 're-read', bot deep-reads even if file hasn't changed and facts are already in memory. Add tool-level guard to check deep_read_at vs modified_time.

knownIssues.title: Drive folder scope — allow-list of folder IDs
knownIssues.description: google_drive_search queries all of Drive. Add optional config-level scopedFolders allow-list to restrict search to specific folders.

knownIssues.title: Obsidian integration layer — human visibility for agent memory
knownIssues.description: Export/sync memories as Markdown files in an Obsidian vault for browsing, graph visualization, and manual curation. Optionally bidirectional (edits in Obsidian sync back to DB). SQLite stays as runtime engine.

currentSprint.name: Integrations + Polish
currentSprint.progress: Drive file types complete, UX polished, prompts/config externalized, memory quality upgraded

thingsNotToRedo: Agent SDK is REMOVED — don't re-add it
schema.sql must be explicitly copied in Dockerfile
Google OAuth: gws CLI for setup, googleapis npm for runtime
Don't hard-code bot responses — prompts are in config/prompts/
Startup crawl skips if offline <5 min
keytar uses false sentinel — logs warning only once
File summaries are conclusions, not descriptions — stored as memories
Self-healing compares expected vs actual memory content
Folder path is evidence, not gospel — content wins over structure
One-time migrations use agent_state guard keys
Mid-loop text is NOT the final response — only capture text from the final turn
Don't force premature answers (removed synthesis hack) — let the bot finish
drive_read_content must return file content to agent, not just 'facts extracted'
Slack markdown block does NOT support tables — use bulleted key-value pairs
Document tasks require reading the actual file, not answering from memory
